title: 1 step DFU - Content of the Software Update tab when there is update available only for Charge Case
scenario: Software Update tab shows Charge Case update available with release notes and Update button while earbuds are marked up to date on Voyager Free 60+
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the phone.
2. Ensure the Osprey (Voyager Free 60+) device is connected, with the Charge Case on at least firmware 5039 and the earbuds on the latest firmware.
3. From the Home screen, tap the Favorites or Settings icon.
5. Observe the status displayed for the Earbuds and the Charge Case.
expected: Earbuds are marked as \"Up to date\". The Charge Case shows its current firmware version, the available firmware version, release notes, and an \"Update\" button.
